checks.name: Isaac Sim verified via discovered python.sh
Docker availability checked without starting container

python_import_isaacsim.cmd:
python3 - <<"PY"
try:
 import isaacsim
 print("isaacsim import OK")
except Exception as e:
 print(type(e).__name__ + ": " + str(e))
 raise SystemExit(42)
PY

isaacsim_python_sh_verify.cmd:
if [ -x /home/horde/venvs/isaacsim45/python.sh ]; then OMNI_KIT_ACCEPT_EULA=YES /home/horde/venvs/isaacsim45/python.sh - <<"PY"
import isaacsim
from isaacsim.simulation_app import SimulationApp
print("Isaac Sim OK")
PY
else echo "no known isaacsim python.sh"; exit 42; fi
